tasks.title: Phase 1: Remove Dead Weight
tasks.description: Remove all regenerable and cached files (38MB savings)

subtasks.title: Remove HTML coverage reports (37MB)
subtasks.description: Delete htmlcov/ directory and update .gitignore
subtasks.details: Delete htmlcov/ directory, verify .gitignore includes htmlcov/, add note to README about regenerating with pytest --cov --cov-report=html
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify coverage can be regenerated with: pytest --cov=core --cov-report=html

subtasks.title: Remove Python bytecode (862 .pyc files, 100 __pycache__ dirs)
subtasks.description: Find and delete all compiled Python files
subtasks.details: Run: find . -type f -name '*.pyc' -delete; find . -type d -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} +; verify .gitignore includes patterns
subtasks.testStrategy: Confirm Python regenerates bytecode automatically on next run

subtasks.title: Clear cache files (34 cache files)
subtasks.description: Remove data_cache/disk/*.cache files
subtasks.details: Delete data_cache/disk/*.cache, verify cache regenerates on next data fetch, update .gitignore
subtasks.testStrategy: Run app and confirm cache files regenerate automatically

subtasks.title: Clean Task Master artifacts
subtasks.description: Remove backup and usage analysis docs
subtasks.details: Remove .taskmaster/backup/, remove .taskmaster/docs/*_analysis.md and *_report.md files, keep config.json and core structure
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify Task Master functions correctly: npx task-master-ai list

subtasks.title: Update .gitignore for excluded files
subtasks.description: Add patterns for regenerable files
subtasks.details: Add: htmlcov/, __pycache__/, *.pyc, data_cache/disk/*.cache, .taskmaster/backup/, .taskmaster/docs/*_report.md
subtasks.testStrategy: Run git status and verify excluded files don't appear

tasks.details: Expected savings: ~38MB (43% of bloat). All removed files are regenerable and should not be in repository.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify project size reduces from 88MB to ~50MB (excluding venv), confirm all files regenerable

tasks.title: Phase 2: Enforce Data Flow Architecture
tasks.description: Eliminate 21+ infrastructure bypasses, enforce VarInputData single source of truth

subtasks.title: Fix core/data_sources/industry_data_service.py
subtasks.description: Replace direct yfinance with VarInputData (line 32)
subtasks.details: Remove 'import yfinance as yf' from line 32. Replace all yf.Ticker() calls with var_data.get_variable() for industry_metrics, sector_data
subtasks.testStrategy: Run: pytest tests/unit/data_sources/test_industry_data_service* -v; verify industry data service returns correct data

subtasks.title: Fix core/data_processing/streamlit_data_processing.py
subtasks.description: Remove direct yfinance, route through VarInputData (line 16)
subtasks.details: Remove 'import yfinance as yf' from line 16. Use load_data_into_var_input_system() pattern for all data loading
subtasks.testStrategy: Run: pytest tests/unit/data_processing/test_enhanced_data_manager* -v; verify Streamlit data loading works

subtasks.title: Clean ui/streamlit/advanced_search_filter.py
subtasks.description: Remove unused yfinance import (line 17, already uses VarInputData)
subtasks.details: Remove 'import yfinance as yf' from line 17 (unused). Already correctly uses VarInputData for 11 variables: company_name, sector, industry, market_cap, etc.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run Streamlit app and test search filter functionality; verify no yfinance calls made

subtasks.title: Fix core/analysis/pb/pb_valuation.py
subtasks.description: Replace yfinance with VarInputData for P/B analysis (line 164)
subtasks.details: Remove 'import yfinance' from line 164. Pass VarInputData to constructor. Use var_data.get_variable() for: book_value, market_cap, stock_price
subtasks.testStrategy: Run: pytest tests/unit/pb/ -v; verify P/B calculations match previous results (regression test)

subtasks.title: Fix core/analysis/ddm/ddm_valuation.py
subtasks.description: Replace yfinance with VarInputData for DDM analysis (line 134)
subtasks.details: Remove 'import yfinance' from line 134. Pass VarInputData to constructor. Use var_data.get_variable() for: dividend_per_share, dividend_growth
subtasks.testStrategy: Run: pytest tests/unit/core/test_ddm_implementation.py -v; verify DDM valuations match previous results

subtasks.title: Fix utils/directory_structure_helper.py
subtasks.description: Replace pd.read_excel with ExcelAdapter (lines 578, 756)
subtasks.details: Replace 'pd.read_excel(file_path)' calls with ExcelAdapter.extract_variables(). Use adapter for validation and extraction.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run directory structure validation tool and verify it works correctly

subtasks.title: Fix core/data_processing/managers/centralized_data_manager.py
subtasks.description: Replace pd.read_excel with ExcelAdapter (lines 560, 579)
subtasks.details: Replace 'pd.read_excel(...)' with ExcelAdapter.extract_variables(). Route: ExcelAdapter → VarInputData. This is core data management.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run: pytest tests/integration/data_sources/ -v; verify Excel data loading works end-to-end

subtasks.title: Audit and validate adapter-only API access
subtasks.description: Verify zero yfinance imports outside adapters, zero pd.read_excel in production
subtasks.details: Run: grep -r 'import yfinance' core --include='*.py' | grep -v 'yfinance_adapter.py'; Expected: zero results. Run: grep -r 'pd.read_excel' core utils --include='*.py'; Expected: zero results.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create and run architecture audit script to validate compliance

subtasks.title: Migrate CentralizedDataManager.fetch_market_data() to VarInputData
subtasks.description: Replace direct yfinance import with VarInputData in fetch_market_data() method (line 822)
subtasks.details: Critical migration: Replace direct yfinance import on line 822 with VarInputData.get_variable() calls. This method is used in 37 production files. Must maintain backward compatibility and test all dependencies.

tasks.details: CRITICAL PHASE: Enforces data flow schema: Adapters → VarInputData → Analysis → Export. Must achieve zero infrastructure bypasses.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite after each migration. Verify 100% pass rate. Create architecture compliance certificate.

tasks.title: Phase 3: Consolidate Examples & Demos
tasks.description: Move 13 example files from core/ to examples/ directory

subtasks.title: Move calculation engine example
subtasks.description: core/analysis/engines/calculation_engine_integration_example.py → examples/
subtasks.details: Move to: examples/analysis/calculation_engine_integration_example.py; Update imports; Test example runs successfully
subtasks.testStrategy: python examples/analysis/calculation_engine_integration_example.py

subtasks.title: Move ML integration example
subtasks.description: core/analysis/ml/examples/ml_integration_example.py → examples/
subtasks.details: Move to: examples/analysis/ml_integration_example.py; Update imports; Test ML example runs
subtasks.testStrategy: python examples/analysis/ml_integration_example.py

subtasks.title: Move P/B analysis examples (3 files)
subtasks.description: Move pb_fair_value_example.py, pb_historical_analysis_example.py, pb_statistical_analysis_example.py
subtasks.details: Move from core/analysis/pb/ to examples/analysis/pb_*.py; Update imports for all 3 files; Test each example runs
subtasks.testStrategy: Run all 3 P/B examples and verify they work correctly

subtasks.title: Move portfolio examples (5 files)
subtasks.description: Move comparison, optimization, backtesting, general, performance examples
subtasks.details: Move 5 files from core/analysis/portfolio/ to examples/portfolio/; Update imports; Test all examples
subtasks.testStrategy: Run each portfolio example and verify functionality

subtasks.title: Move risk analysis examples (3 files)
subtasks.description: Move risk_analysis_example.py, stress_testing_example.py, var_example_usage.py
subtasks.details: Move from core/analysis/risk/ to examples/risk/; Update imports; Test all risk examples
subtasks.testStrategy: Run each risk example and verify they work correctly

subtasks.title: Consolidate duplicate examples
subtasks.description: Merge composite variable demos and risk visualization examples
subtasks.details: Merge: composite_variable_calculator_demo.py + composite_variable_demo.py → composite_variables_comprehensive_demo.py; Merge: risk_analysis_example.py + risk_visualization_example.py → risk_analysis_comprehensive_demo.py
subtasks.testStrategy: Test merged examples cover all use cases from original files

subtasks.title: Update documentation for new examples structure
subtasks.description: Update README.md examples section
subtasks.details: Update README.md to point to examples/ directory. Document new examples structure and organization.
subtasks.testStrategy: Review README and verify all example links work

tasks.details: Expected savings: ~1MB. Improves code organization by separating examples from production code.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify zero example files remain in core/, all examples work from new location

tasks.title: Phase 4: Test Suite Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize test suite (remove redundancy, maintain >90% coverage)

subtasks.title: Audit and identify redundant tests
subtasks.description: Scan test directories for duplicate coverage
subtasks.details: Scan: tests/unit/data_processing/, tests/integration/data_sources/, tests/unit/analysis/; Create redundancy report listing duplicate test scenarios
subtasks.testStrategy: Generate coverage report before and after to ensure no coverage loss

subtasks.title: Consolidate data processing tests
subtasks.description: Merge duplicate data validation tests
subtasks.details: Keep unique test scenarios and edge cases; Remove redundant happy-path tests; Maintain >90% coverage
subtasks.testStrategy: pytest tests/unit/data_processing/ --cov=core.data_processing --cov-report=term

subtasks.title: Optimize regression tests
subtasks.description: Keep critical bug tests, archive irrelevant ones
subtasks.details: Review tests/regression/; Keep tests for: FCF bugs, date correlation, units bugs; Archive tests for resolved non-critical issues
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify critical regressions still caught after optimization

subtasks.title: Streamline performance tests
subtasks.description: Keep key benchmarks, remove redundant variations
subtasks.details: Review tests/performance/; Keep key performance benchmarks; Document performance baselines; Remove redundant variations
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify performance benchmarks still run and produce valid results

subtasks.title: Verify critical test coverage maintained
subtasks.description: Ensure core calculations, data flow, regression tests preserved
subtasks.details: MUST MAINTAIN: DCF/DDM/P/B calculation accuracy tests; End-to-end data flow tests; Known critical bug regression tests; Coverage >90% overall
subtasks.testStrategy: pytest --cov=core --cov-report=term; Verify >90% coverage, 100% pass rate

tasks.details: Expected savings: 5-8MB (15-25% test suite reduction). Must maintain >90% coverage and 100% critical test preservation.
tasks.testStrategy: Generate coverage report before/after. Verify no loss in critical coverage areas.

tasks.title: Phase 5: Code Cleanup & Validation
tasks.description: Remove debug tools, unused converters, deprecated code

subtasks.title: Remove DCF debug tools (after validation)
subtasks.description: Delete debug_dcf_calculation.py, debug_dcf_values.py
subtasks.details: CONDITION: Only after validating DCF calculations work correctly. Archive to legacy/deprecated/ before deletion. Files: core/analysis/dcf/debug_dcf_calculation.py, core/analysis/dcf/debug_dcf_values.py
subtasks.testStrategy: pytest tests/unit/dcf/ -v; pytest tests/integration/end_to_end/ -v

subtasks.title: Remove yfinance debug tools (after validation)
subtasks.description: Delete debug_yfinance_fields_updated.py, debug_yfinance_fields.py
subtasks.details: CONDITION: Only after validating yfinance adapter works. Files: tools/diagnostics/debug_yfinance_fields_updated.py, tools/diagnostics/debug_yfinance_fields.py
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify yfinance adapter extracts all needed fields correctly

subtasks.title: Remove P/B debug tools (after validation)
subtasks.description: Delete debug_pb_historical.py
subtasks.details: CONDITION: Only after validating P/B analysis works. File: tools/diagnostics/debug_pb_historical.py
subtasks.testStrategy: pytest tests/unit/pb/ -v; verify P/B historical analysis works

subtasks.title: Evaluate and remove unused converters
subtasks.description: Audit converter usage, remove if fully replaced by adapters
subtasks.details: Check: core/data_processing/converters/*_converter.py; Search codebase for import statements; CONDITION: Only remove if fully replaced by adapters; Backup to legacy/deprecated/
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify adapters provide all converter functionality; grep -r 'from.*converters import' core

subtasks.title: Clean deprecated code markers
subtasks.description: Remove or document TODO remove, DEPRECATED, Legacy markers
subtasks.details: Search: grep -r '# TODO remove\|# DEPRECATED\|# Legacy' core --include='*.py'; Review each for removal safety; Remove or document why kept
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify no broken functionality after removal

subtasks.title: Remove legacy directory
subtasks.description: Delete entire legacy/ directory after verification
subtasks.details: Verify no production code references legacy/; Create final archive if needed; Delete legacy/deprecated/ and legacy/backup/; Rely on git history
subtasks.testStrategy: grep -r 'from legacy\|import legacy' core tests ui; verify zero results

tasks.details: Expected savings: 2-3MB. CRITICAL: Only remove after comprehensive validation that data flow works correctly.
tasks.testStrategy: Run full test suite before and after cleanup. 100% pass rate required.

tasks.title: Phase 6: Comprehensive Validation & Testing
tasks.description: Ensure all changes preserve functionality - end-to-end validation

subtasks.title: Run full test suite (unit, integration, regression)
subtasks.description: Execute all tests with 100% pass rate requirement
subtasks.details: Run: pytest tests/unit/ -v --tb=short; pytest tests/integration/ -v --tb=short; pytest tests/regression/ -v --tb=short; REQUIREMENT: 100% pass rate
subtasks.testStrategy: All tests must pass. Fix any failures immediately before proceeding.

subtasks.title: Generate coverage report
subtasks.description: Verify >90% overall coverage, >95% for core/analysis/
subtasks.details: Run: pytest --cov=core --cov=config --cov=utils --cov-report=html --cov-report=term; REQUIREMENT: >90% overall, >95% core/analysis/
subtasks.testStrategy: Review coverage report, add tests if needed to meet requirements

subtasks.title: Validate data flow end-to-end (Excel → Export)
subtasks.description: Test complete pipeline for AAPL, MSFT, GOOG, NVDA
subtasks.details: For each ticker: 1) Load Excel via ExcelAdapter, 2) Verify VarInputData storage, 3) Run DCF/DDM/P/B analyses, 4) Export to Excel/CSV/PDF; Create validation script
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify calculations match previous results, no errors, exports correct

subtasks.title: Manual Streamlit UI testing
subtasks.description: Test all UI features, visualizations, exports
subtasks.details: Run: run_fcf_streamlit.bat; Test: Load MSFT, GOOG, NVDA, TSLA; Verify: All visualizations, metrics, search filter, Monte Carlo; Test: PDF, Excel, CSV exports
subtasks.testStrategy: User acceptance checklist: All features work, no errors in terminal/logs

subtasks.title: Performance validation benchmarks
subtasks.description: Benchmark data loading, analysis, cache performance
subtasks.details: Benchmark: 1) Load 10yr data for 5 companies (<10s each), 2) DCF for 10 companies (<5s each), 3) Cache hit ratio (>70%); Compare with previous metrics
subtasks.testStrategy: Performance maintained or improved vs previous benchmarks

subtasks.title: Review logs for errors/warnings
subtasks.description: Analyze error logs, warnings, verify no bypass warnings
subtasks.details: Check logs/ for errors and warnings; Search for: 'direct API access', 'bypassing VarInputData'; REQUIREMENT: Zero bypass warnings
subtasks.testStrategy: Clean logs with no errors, no architecture violations

subtasks.title: Create validation report and compliance certificate
subtasks.description: Document all test results, architecture compliance
subtasks.details: Create: .taskmaster/docs/optimization_validation_report.md; Include: Test results, coverage, benchmarks, manual testing, before/after comparison; Create architecture compliance certificate
subtasks.testStrategy: Complete validation report with all metrics documented

tasks.details: CRITICAL PHASE: This phase is mandatory - do not skip any validation steps. Ensures 100% functionality preservation.
tasks.testStrategy: Success criteria: 100% test pass, all functionality working, zero violations, performance maintained

objectives: Enforce data flow schema: Adapters → VarInputData → Analysis → Export
Maintain 100% test pass rate and >90% coverage
